concerns.text: The plan cites 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/zhixiangd/ERA5/resolve/main/1982_1.h5' for ERA5 data. This file is explicitly named '1982_1.h5', indicating it contains data for the year 1982 only. The IceCube muon flux data (modern detector) likely covers 2010+. The plan acknowledges this risk in 'Risks & Mitigations' but fails to provide a verified source for overlapping dates. Without a dataset covering the intersection of IceCube operations and ERA5 availability, the core correlation analysis (FR-002, FR-003) is impossible. The current dataset citation is inappropriate for the temporal scope of the study.

The IceCube dataset cited ('chy626/icecube_cup_w_distractors_new_0') is described in the plan as a 'distractor' task dataset. The plan admits uncertainty: 'We must verify at runtime that... contains a time-series of muon counts'. If the dataset only contains event-level tracks without pre-aggregated daily counts or lacks a 'date' column, the ingestion pipeline (Phase 0) will fail to produce the required 'MuonTimeSeries' entity. The plan relies on a dataset that may not provide the specific 'daily aggregated muon counts' required by FR-002, making the data source inappropriate for the specified functional requirement.
